subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He in Whose grasp lieth the dominion of all things, before Whom the thunder praiseth Him in fear and the clouds in His grandeur. There is no God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی بیده ملکوت کلشیء یسبح له الرعد من خشیته و السحاب من عظمته لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @apocalyptic imagery, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation
